---
title: "resume"
author: Kyle Tolliver
params:
  pdf_mode:
    value: true
  cache_data:
    value: true
output: 
  pagedown::html_resume:
    css: ['resume.css', 'resume']
    self_contained: true
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
source("../script.R")
datpath <- "../data/"
load_libraries()
```

```{r eval=FALSE}
render_resume()
```

Aside
====================================

Contact Info {#contact}
------------------------------------

```{r contact}
print_contact(readcsv(glue("{datpath}contact_info.csv")) %>% filter(in_resume))
```

Skills {#skills}
------------------------------------

```{r skill}
print_skills(datpath)
```

Disclaimer {#disclaimer}
------------------------------------

Member of [Tau Beta Pi](https://tbp.org) <br /> Engineering Honor Society <br /> Idaho Delta chapter at BYU-Idaho.

This resume was made with <br /> the R package [pagedown](https://github.com/rstudio/pagedown).

Main
====================================

Kyle Tolliver {#title}
------------------------------------

Education {data-icon=graduation-cap}
------------------------------------

```{r}
print_resume_education()
```

Experience {data-icon=briefcase}
------------------------------------

```{r}
print_resume_section(datpath, 'experience')
```

Projects {data-icon=laptop}
------------------------------------

```{r}
print_resume_section(datpath, 'projects')
```
